**What is your question?**
A clear and concise description of what you're trying to figure out.

**Which part of the system does it pertain to?**
- [ ] Chrome Extension (UI/Capture)
- [ ] Node.js Server (Database/API)
- [ ] Python Worker (Signal Processing/FFT)
- [ ] Database (Postgres)
- [ ] Other (General Question)

**What have you already tried?**
A clear and concise description of what you've already tried to do.
